title: notifications core — developer configuration
description: Developer / operator configuration. Mirrors `config/notifications.php`. Deploy-static; changes require redeploy + `config:cache`. Per-channel config lives in the respective channel module's config.json.

keys.description: Delegated to channel modules for ingestion; naming reserved for consistency.

retry.description: Retry backoff schedule for channel-module SendJobs (channel modules import this shape).

keys.description: 6 attempts total (30s, 2m, 10m, 1h, 6h, 24h). Applied per channel module.
Local time (per user's timezone) for daily digest delivery.
Local time for weekly digest delivery.
Skip digest delivery if fewer than N items accumulated (avoids empty emails).
Cap items per digest. If exceeded, split into multiple digests OR truncate with a 'plus N more' summary.

caches.description: Cache TTL overrides. See caches.json for pattern-level details.

keys.description: Every ->notify() queues. Sync via ->notifyNow() only — no `sync` config.
Per-workspace dispatches/min. Null = no limit. Gated by notifications.dispatch-per-workspace-rate-limit Pennant flag.
Channels used for priority=critical when preferences don't override. SMS excluded from default critical channels (cost).
Signed URL validity from mail footer. Older tokens stop rendering the confirmation page but if already unsubscribed, stays unsubscribed.
SLA for propagating the unsubscribe to the preference cache. Enforced by PreferenceCacheInvalidator listener.

emails_render_pipeline.description: Render pipeline manifest — read by SeedTemplatesCommand.

keys.description: Path to the render manifest emitted by the emails renderer at CI build time.
Optional S3 base URL if templates are read from S3 at boot instead of a bundled manifest.
Refuse rendering when Blade encounters an undefined variable. Off = renders '{{ $var ?? '' }}' fallback.
Order: user preference → workspace default (settings.json) → platform default (category).
